contactId.title: contactId
contactId.description: The Salesforce ID of the contact to assign the follow-up task to.

assetId.title: assetId
assetId.description: The Salesforce ID of the asset for the installation.

customerName.title: customerName
customerName.description: The name of the customer to contact about installation dates.

serialNumber.title: serialNumber
serialNumber.description: The serial number of the device to be installed.

preferredDate1.title: preferredDate1
preferredDate1.description: First preferred installation date in YYYY-MM-DD format, extracted from the customer SMS reply.

preferredTime1.title: preferredTime1
preferredTime1.description: Time of day for first preference. Must be one of: Morning, Afternoon, or Evening.

preferredDate2.title: preferredDate2
preferredDate2.description: Second preferred installation date in YYYY-MM-DD format, extracted from the customer SMS reply.

preferredTime2.title: preferredTime2
preferredTime2.description: Time of day for second preference. Must be one of: Morning, Afternoon, or Evening.

preferredDate3.title: preferredDate3
preferredDate3.description: Third preferred installation date in YYYY-MM-DD format, extracted from the customer SMS reply.

preferredTime3.title: preferredTime3
preferredTime3.description: Time of day for third preference. Must be one of: Morning, Afternoon, or Evening.
